The '''''Eidolon''''' was a redesigned [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:EidolonLaunchRack.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The ''Eidolon''{{'s}} special [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] launch rack.]]
The Eidolon design contained several advances, it boasted upgraded [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] launch racks that were able to launch several [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] in a very short time.
After landing/docking the TIE's in the dual TIE rack mounted in the docking bay at the base of the command tower, the racked TIE's were shunted through maintenance and refueling areas, ending up in the launch corridors on either side of the ship.
Thus allowing a constant stream of short-mission fighter protection.

==History==
Secretly manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] in the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]], the ''Eidolon'' disappeared on its maiden flight. Unbeknownst to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at large, the ship was nothing more than a ruse by [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] to hide his accumulated wealth on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Although the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] never went into full production, the hull and launch rack of the prototype was made and retrofitted into [[Eidolon Base]].

[[File:XWRS32-FC.jpg|thumb|150px|The ''Eidolon'' during the [[evacuation of Ciutric]].]]

==Behind the scenes==
The cover of [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]] incorrectly shows the ''Eidolon'' during the [[evacuation of Ciutric]].
